title: Honor of the Family
writer: Lenore J. Coffee, James Ashmore Creelman, Émile Fabre
actors: Bebe Daniels, Warren William, Alan Mowbray
plot: Honor of the Family is a 1931 American Pre-Code drama film released by First National Pictures (a subsidiary of Warner Bros.), starring Bebe Daniels and Warren William. It was based on the play by Emil Fabre, from the Honoré de Ba...
